## #44584
- added: 2021-07-27 10:09:24

* #CRQ\n* What changes are in the CRQ ?\n* Which customer(s) or project is the CRQ intended for?\n* What customer impact, if goes wrong, or roll back ?\n* How we are sure CRQ will not cause unintended customer impacts ?\n\n\\\n

## #42653

Tutorial.mp4](https://mastercard.sharepoint.com/sites/MPGDDevelopment/Shared%20Documents/General/Brown%20Bag%20videos/2020.10.08%20Gold%20Panning%20Tutorial.mp4)\n\n\\\nLink for notes on the process, <https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSDKH/MPGS+Gold+Panning>\n\n\\\n<https://confluence.mastercard.int/display/MPGSCS/Creating+a+New+MPGS+MSO>\n\n\\\n[ NGFT](https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSETP/F157510%3A+Spike%3A+Support+GFT+Next+Generation+product)\n\n#### Architecture documents\n\n[HotHot and OLTP documentations](https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?spaceKey=MPGSSYSKB&title=Architecture+Overview#ArchitectureOverview-OLTP)\n\n[Deployment diagram](https://cd-tooling.uat.tnspayments.com/gateway-system-docs/current-mpgs/hothot/deployment/hothot/hothot.html)\n\n[https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSYSKB/System+Context+Diagram?preview=/267262849/267262848/System Overview.png](https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSYSKB/System+Context+Diagram?preview=/267262849/267262848/System%20Overview.png)\n\n<https://cd-tooling.uat.tnspayments.com/gateway-system-docs/current-mpgs/oltp/deployment/oltp/oltp.html>\n\n\\\n[Callback interface logs](https://splunk.mastercard.int/en-US/app/mc_ems_all_search/search?q=search%20index%3Dapp_mpgs%20sourcetype%3D%22mpgs%3Asoftware%3Acallbackinterface%22%20region!%3Dmt%20region!%3D%22IN%22%20region!%3Dde%20region!%3Dpn%20%20Request%20violating%20Content%20Security%20Policy%3A&display.page.search.mode=smart&dispatch.sample_ratio=1&earliest=-30d%40d&latest=now&display.events.maxLines=100&display.events.fields=%5B%22host%22%2C%22source%22%2C%22resource%22%2C%22app%22%2C%22thread_id%22%5D&sid=1596786717.36134_212567AE-1514-43C4-977D-D75AF6FDA8B7)\n\n\\\n[PI Wiki Page: <https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSDKH/MPGS+App+Dev+Howto>\n2. Production Versions: <https://stripe-tool.uat.tnspayments.com/tools/stripestatus/>\n3. groups](https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=460279670)\n\nF268894 Infra XS PI3\n\n\\\nDynatrace: <https://zti834.dynatrace-managed.com/login>\n\nWhich libraries used by which jars: <https://ci01bldmst01v.qabri.mastercard.int/jenkins/job/REL_SECURITY_MPGS_Delivered_Libraries_Trunk/>\n\nSmoke test devlite: <https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=460729218>\n\n\\\nDevLite setups\n\n<https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?spaceKey=MPGSSDKH&title=The+Default+Set+of+DevLite+Applications>\n\n\\\n<https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSDKH/How+to+Minimize+Your+Devlite>\n\n\\\n<https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSDKH/How+to+Drop+WAR+Files+on+your+DevLite>\n\n<https://confluence.mastercard.int/display/MPGSCS/Creating+a+New+MPGS+MSO>\n\n<https://confluence.mastercard.int/pages/viewpage.action?spaceKey=MCPGSPMT&title=Definition+of+Done+-+Feature>\n\n[Archer ](https://archergrc.mastercard.int/apps/ArcherApp/Home.aspx) Pen Test, GRC\n\n[CyberArk](https://cyberark.pvwa.mastercard.int/PasswordVault/v10/) Pre requisite to login to QA\n\n\\\n\\\nQA Servers need login wjb4syd497\n\n<https://splunk.mastercard.int/>\n\n- [ ] [Sonar setup process](https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?spaceKey=MPGSSDKH&title=SonarLint) old and [new policy](https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=377425526), anything to do?- 1h\n\nDynatrace Access: <https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=332479740>\n\n\\\n<https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=460279670> Util versions\n\n\\\n<https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSETP/F198547+-++Analysis+%3A+Log+remote+Ip+in+all+front-end+services> App statuses.\n\n\\\nQA Ops Consoles\n\n<https://qa03.gateway.mastercard.com/console/>\n\n\\\nCSP header test\n\n<https://acleda.gateway.mastercard.com/mm/>\n\n\\\nConfluence of All test env\n\n\\\n<https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSCICD/MPGS+Test+Environments#MPGSTestEnvironments-Proxy>\n\n\\\nJenkin job Release jar/components\n\n<https://ci01bldmst01v.qabri.mastercard.int:8080/jenkins/job/_AS_WSAPI-pipeline/>\n\n\\\n<https://cd-tooling.uat.tnspayments.com/gateway-system-docs/current-mpgs/oltp/deployment/oltp/tier-Gateway.html>\n\n<https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/pages/viewpage.action?spaceKey=MPGSSETP&title=S1430982+-+Investigate+best+solution+to+problem>\n\n\\\nEdit jars\n\n<https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSDKH/Editing+wars>\n\n\\\n[CSD Process](https://confluence.mastercard.int/display/MPGSEPROC/Process+for+MSO+and+Merchant-Facing+Documentation)\n\n\\\n[Claim Devlites](https://ci01bldmst01v.qabri.mastercard.int:17099/)\n\ngrep -rn "Deployment of web application archive" /opt/tns/aspcom-com/apache-tomcat/logs/catalina.out | wc -l\n\n\\\n- [ ] Plant to migrate\n  - [ ] Install Hub, Air and Token in mobile\n  - [ ] Take backup of documents in one drive\n  - [ ] Take backup software folders in shared drive\n  - [ ] New laptop: <https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSEPROC/New+Starters>\n\n\\\nPlease find below link for learning objective for PI4\n\n<https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSETP/Target+Gateway+Learning+Objectives+-+Hercules>\n\n\\\nIntellij License server\n\n<http://license.mpgsdev.mastercard.int>\n\n\\\nThe expectations for this testing are documented: <https://fusion.mastercard.int/confluence/display/MPGSSDKH/Multi+Browser+Testing>\n\n\\\n
